flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 21% at Jefferson College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (2.5k vs 3.2k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Jefferson College rose 20% between 2006 and 2009 ($1.7k → $2.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Jefferson College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.7k → $8.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Jefferson College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.8% → 0.0%).
